scripts.agent:generator: cd agents/generator && uv run python -m app --port 10001
scripts.agent:evaluator: cd agents/evaluator && uv run python -m app --port 10002
scripts.agent:greeter: cd agents/greeter && uv run python -m app --port 10003
scripts.agent:corrector: cd agents/corrector && uv run python -m app --port 10005
scripts.frontend: sleep 15 && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
